config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Society matters, but I do not believe its interests should automatically come before the rights of the individual. In my view, individual rights are the basic protection against abuse by governments, majorities, and powerful groups. A society is healthier when it respects people first and only limits rights in narrow, truly necessary cases.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu diprioritaskan di atas hak individu. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu itu bukan bonus, melainkan pagar utama untuk mencegah mayoritas atau pemerintah bertindak sewenang-wenang. Tentu ada saat-saat tertentu, seperti kesehatan publik atau keselamatan umum, ketika hak bisa dibatasi, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, dan dapat dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, dalih “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my Indonesian perspective, I have seen how easily “public interest” can be used to justify silence, pressure, or unfair treatment, especially when power is uneven and people have little ability to push back. Society does matter, of course, but it is strongest when it protects individual rights first and only limits them in narrow cases like real public safety or public health needs. If we reverse that priority, we risk giving too much power to the majority and too little protection to ordinary people.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu secara umum. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat hak individu sebagai batas penting terhadap kekuasaan mayoritas dan pemerintah; tanpa batas itu, “kepentingan umum” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi alasan untuk menekan orang yang lemah atau tidak populer. Memang ada keadaan darurat seperti kesehatan publik atau keselamatan umum, tetapi pembatasannya harus benar-benar sempit, sementara, dan bisa diuji secara ketat. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang paling disiplin melindungi hak sambil hanya membatasi seperlunya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I still reject the idea that society’s interests should normally outrank individual rights. From an Indonesian perspective, “public interest” can sound noble, but in practice it is often used to pressure people into silence or to excuse unfair treatment, especially when ordinary people have weak protection against power. I do think society can restrict certain rights in real emergencies like public health or safety, but that must be narrow, temporary, and accountable. If we make society the default priority, the people who lose first are usually the ones with the least power to defend themselves.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu justru adalah benteng utama melawan penyalahgunaan oleh pemerintah, mayoritas, atau kelompok yang lebih kuat, dan sejarah kami penuh dengan contoh saat alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk menekan orang yang tidak populer. Memang ada keadaan darurat seperti wabah atau ancaman keselamatan, tetapi itu pengecualian yang harus sempit, sementara, dan bisa diuji secara ketat, bukan alasan untuk membalik urutan prioritas. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi dalih untuk mengorbankan orang yang paling rentan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
